member.name: F:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of MyLogger. It is initialized to null, and it is created when the Instance property is accessed for the first time. The lock is used to ensure that only one instance of MyLogger is created in a multithreaded environment.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.#ctor
member.summary: The constructor for the MyLogger class. It sets the AutoFlush property of the Trace class to true. This means that the Trace class will automatically flush its buffers when a message is written to it.

member.name: P:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.Instance
member.summary: The Instance property returns the singleton instance of MyLogger. It uses the lock keyword to ensure that only one instance of MyLogger is created in a multithreaded environment.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.AddListener(System.Diagnostics.TraceListener)
member.summary: The AddListener method adds a TraceListener to the Trace.Listeners collection. If the listener is not already in the collection, it is added.
member.param: The listener to be added to the Trace.Listeners collection

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.RemoveListener(System.Diagnostics.TraceListener)
member.summary: The RemoveListener method removes a TraceListener from the Trace.Listeners collection. If the listener is in the collection, it is removed.
member.param: The listener to be removed from the Trace.Listeners collection

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.LogInfo(System.String)
member.summary: The LogInfo method writes an information message to the Trace class. It uses the Trace.TraceInformation method to write the message to the trace listeners.
member.param: The message to be logged and it should be an string message

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.LogWarning(System.String)
member.summary: The LogWarning method writes a warning message to the Trace class. It uses the Trace.TraceWarning method to write the message to the trace listeners.
member.param: The message to be logged and it should be an string message

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.LoggingFile.MyLogger.LogError(System.String)
member.summary: The LogError method writes an error message to the Trace class. It uses the Trace.TraceError method to write the message to the trace listeners.
member.param: The message to be logged and it should be an string message

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.model.attack.AttackItem.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor for AttackItem, it initializes the Name to an empty string, Hit to 0, and Range to 0.

member.name: P:Mandatory2DGameFramework.model.defence.DefenceItem.ReduceHitPoint
member.summary: The ReduceHitPoint property represents the amount of hit points to reduce when the DefenceItem is used.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.model.defence.DefenceItem.#ctor
member.summary: here is the constructor for the DefenceItem class, it initializes the Name to an empty string and ReduceHitPoint to 0.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.model.defence.DefenceItem.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string that represents the current object.

member.name: T:Mandatory2DGameFramework.Observer.IObserver
member.summary: Observer interface for receiving notifications from subjects.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.Observer.IObserver.Update(Mandatory2DGameFramework.Observer.ISubject,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the observer with a message from the subject.

member.name: P:Mandatory2DGameFramework.worlds.World.MaxX
member.summary: The maximum X and Y values of the world

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.worlds.World.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Here we create the world with the given maxX and maxY, and we initialize the world objects and creatures lists.
member.param: The maximum X value of the world that means the maximum width of the world
The maximum Y value of the world, that means the maximum height of the world

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.worlds.World.ToString
member.summary: returns a string with the values of the maxX and maxY of the world, and the lists of world objects and creatures.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.worlds.WorldObject.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor for WorldObject, it initializes the Name to an empty string, and sets Lootable and Removeable to false.

member.name: M:Mandatory2DGameFramework.worlds.WorldObject.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the WorldObject, including the Name, Lootable, and Removeable properties.
